_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: After seven days in culture, MN-2 exhibited a tight spheroid formation...Within two days in microtissue culture, MN-2 microtissues began to reduce in overall size
details: Exhibited tight spheroid formation after seven days in culture and began to reduce in overall size within two days in microtissue culture due to collagen matrix remodeling
